name: io.github.AInoAKARI/one-minute-akari
title: AIﾉアカリ☆ One-Minute Akari
description: A free, no-account, no-payment 60-second support response for overwhelm, loneliness, shame, anger, numbness, sleeplessness, money worry, or being unable to start. No diagnosis, personal writing, or sales pressure.
